sourceMovie.title: The Matrix Resurrections
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Matrix Resurrections works as a science fiction movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The science fiction and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Divergent
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Matrix Resurrections clicked for you, Divergent (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Matrix Resurrections?
faq.answer: Try Divergent, The Matrix Reloaded, The Matrix Revolutions—each shares DNA with The Matrix Resurrections while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Matrix Resurrections?
faq.answer: The Matrix Resurrections (2021) is best described as Science Fiction, Action, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Matrix Resurrections part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "The Matrix Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
